  • All Classes Interface Summary Class Summary Enum Summary Exception Summary 
    Class Description
    Brand  
    ChemicalRepresentation
    The persistent class for the chemical_representation database table.
    ChemicalRepresentationSystem  
    ClosureBuilderAgent
    Creates transitive closure table from relationship file.
    CodingSystem
    The persistent class for the coding_system database table.
    Component
    Component is an abstract class which has been derived from VersionedComponent class.
    ComponentFactory
    Factory class to generate Components using the getComponent() method.
    CompositeDescription
    CompositeDescription is extended from Description.
    CompositionDetail  
    Concept
    Concept is a clinical idea associated with a unique identifier .
    ConceptDefException  
    ConceptDetails
    This class contains all the details related to a particular Concept including the list of descriptions and relationships related to that Concept.
    ConceptFSNException  
    ConceptStateException  
    ConcreteRelationship
    Concrete Relationship represents an association between concept and concrete domain.
    ConnectionManager
    This class manages the database connection.
    Constants
    Defines constants used in application.
    DBSchemaMapping
    Database mappings
    DBUtil
    Database resource provider utility for query generation and data fetching.
    Derivative
    Derivative is an abstract class inherited from VersionedComponent class Reference sets are also part of Derivatives.
    Description
    Description is a human readable text of a concept.
    DISBAgent
    A concrete implementation of IDISBAgent Library for application.
    DISBAgentAPI  
    DISBContants  
    DrugType  
    EnumAcceptability
    If EnumAcceptability value is,
    ALL - refers to all description for a concept (both preferred and acceptable).
    PREFERRED - refers to all preferred description for a concept (including FSN).
    EnumAcceptabilityId
    If acceptability is,
    ACCEPTABLE - refers to SNOMED CT Concept id for acceptable
    PREFERRED - refers to SNOMED CT Concept id for preferred
    EnumCaseSignificance
    If case significance is,
    INITIAL_CHAR_CASE_INSENSITIVE - refers to SNOMED CT Concept id for initial character case insensitive from the SNOMED CT Component metadata hierarchy
    CASE_SENSITIVE - refers to SNOMED CT Concept id for case sensitive
    CASE_INSENSITIVE - refers to SNOMED CT Concept id for case insensitive
    EnumCharacteristicType
    If Characteristic Type is,
    INFERRED_RELATIONSHIP - refers to SNOMED CT Concept id for Inferred Relationship the SNOMED CT Component metadata hierarchy
    ADDITIONAL_RELATIONSHIP - refers to SNOMED CT Concept id for Additional Relationship
    STATED_RELATIONSHIP - refers to SNOMED CT Concept id for Stated Relationship
    QUALIFYING_RELATIONSHIP - refers to SNOMED CT Concept id for Qualifying Relationship
    DEFINING_RELATIONSHIP - refers to SNOMED CT Concept id for Defining Relationship
    EnumComponent
    If component is,
    CONCEPT-refers to Concept class
    DESCRIPTION- refers to Description class
    RELATIONSHIP- refers to Relationship class
    EnumDefStatus
    If definition status is
    PRIMITIVE-refers to primitive concepts and returns the Concept id corresponding to Primitive from SNOMED CT Component metadata hierarchy
    DEFINED- refers to fully defined concepts and returns the Concept id corresponding to Fully Defined from SNOMED CT Component metadata hierarchy
    EnumDescType
    If description type is
    FULLY_SPECIFIED_NAME-refers to fully specified name(FSN) and returns the Concept id corresponding to FULLY_SPECIFIED_NAME from SNOMED CT Component metadata hierarchy
    SYNONYM- refers to synonyms and returns the Concept id corresponding to SYNONYM from SNOMED CT Component metadata hierarchy
    DEFINITION- refers to Definition and returns the Concept id corresponding to DEFINITION from SNOMED CT Component metadata hierarchy
    EnumDirection
    If EnumDirection value is,
    SOURCE - refers to Parents direction.
    DESTINATION - refers to Children direction.
    EnumLangRefset
    If Refset ID is
    UK- refers to Concept id corresponding to UK English
    US- refers to Concept id corresponding to US English
    EnumModifier
    If modifier is
    UNIVERSAL_RESTRICTION- refers to the Concept id corresponding to Universal_Restriction from SNOMED CT Component metadata hierarchy
    EXISTENTIAL_RESTRICTION- refers to the Concept id corresponding to Existential_Restriction from SNOMED CT Component metadata hierarchy
    EnumProperties  
    EnumRefset  
    EnumRelationshipType
    Provides the SNOMED CT Concept id corresponding to a particular type of Relationship
    EnumSemantic  
    EnumSemanticTag
    Provides the values for all the possible Semantic Tags/ hierarchies
    EnumState
    If EnumState value is,
    ACTIVE - refers to active Components.
    INACTIVE - refers to inactive Components.
    BOTH - both refers to active and inactive Components.
    ExploreIndex
    Implementation of document search functionality with Lucene version 8.7.0.
    ExploreService
    Provides the basic methods to query the SNOMED CT repository for finding ancestors and descendants of a concept.
    ExpressionConstraintLanguageService  
    FullReleaseDirectoryException
    Handles Full Release directory exception.
    GenericCompositionDetails  
    GenericDescription  
    GenericDrug  
    GenericDrugtypeInfo  
    HttpConnection  
    ICDMapAgent
    Maps SNOMED CT ID (conceptId) to ICD-10 code.
    ICDMapAgentMapAPI
    ICDMapAgentMapAPI class contains the sample code for implementing the SNOMED CT to ICD-10 map API.
    Identifier
    Class inherited from VersionedComponent class.
    IDISBAgent
    Library interface for application.
    ImportService
    Provides methods for index creation.
    IndexCreationDeletion
    Implementation of index creation functionality with Lucene version 8.7.0.
    IndexException  
    IndexReaderFactory  
    KeyBasedComparator
    The class compares two Description objects on the basis of textual representation.
    LoggerUtility
    Class Logger is the utility class which logs the exceptions or messages.
    LOINCsnomedAPI
    Sample class for LOINC code to SNOMED SCT ID (and vice versa) API.
    LookupIndex
    Implementation of document search functionality with Lucene version 8.7.0.
    LookupService
    Provides the basic methods to query the SNOMED CT repository for finding Concept details based on Concept ID, Relationships etc.
    LuceneUtility
    Utility class providing common methods and objects for Lucene Index functionality is provided by this class.
    Manufacturer  
    MapAdvice
    Provides advice for a SNOMED CT to ICD-10 map.
    MapGroup
    Provides SNOMED CT to ICD-10 mapping details for a group.
    MapResult
    Provides the mapping result.
    MedicinalProduct  
    MedicineDetail  
    MedicineLicenseStatus  
    PropertyReader
    Class Reads the properties.
    QueryManager
    Establishes a connection to fetch data from SNOMED CT database.
    Record
    Defines the data/structure to be provided as input diagnosis record.
    RecordStatus  
    Refset  
    RefsetExtensionIndex
    Implementation of document search functionality with Lucene version 8.7.0.
    RefsetExtensionService
    Provides the basic methods to query the SNOMED CT repository for finding Concepts related to Refsets and Extensions.
    RefSetMember
    Abstract class RefSetMember derived from Derivative Each Refset shall be added as a separate class that shall inherit this class
    Relationship
    Relationship represents an association between two concepts.
    RelationshipTC
    This class is used for finding descendant
    SCompoundExpressionConstraint  
    SConstraint  
    SearchIndex
    Implementation of document search functionality with Lucene version 8.7.0.
    SearchService
    Provides the basic methods to query the SNOMED CT repository for finding suggestions and searching Concepts.
    SEclAttribute  
    SEclAttributeSet  
    SECLObjectFactory  
    SEclRefinement  
    SemanticTagBuilder
    Provides semantic tag details .
    SemanticTagList
    SemanticTagList class finds the semantic tag of a concept Id
    SimpleMapRefset  
    SimpleMapRefsetGroup  
    SimpleMapRefsetResult  
    SnoDomainUtil
    Provides utility of concept, description and refset.
    SNOMEDAgentExploreAPI
    SampleforExploreAPI class contains the sample code for implementing the explore API.
    SNOMEDAgentLookupAPI
    SampleforLookupAPI class contains the sample code for implementing the lookup APIs.
    SNOMEDAgentSearchAPI
    SampleforSearchAPI class contains the sample code for implementing the search APIs in SNOMEDAgent class in CSNOLib.
    SNOMEDAgentSuggestAPI
    SampleforSuggestAPI class contains the sample code for implementing the suggest APIs in SNOMEDAgent class in CSNOLib.
    SRefinedExpressionConstraint  
    SSubAttributeSet  
    SSubExpressionConstraint  
    SSubRefinement  
    SubstanceDescription  
    SubstanceDetail  
    SubstanceIdentifier  
    TestICDMapAgentJUnit
    TestICDMapAgentJUnit class contains the test cases related to SNOMED CT to ICD-10 map.
    TestQueryManager
    TestQueryManager class contains the test cases related to exploring details of SNOMED CT (concept Id).
    TestSimpleMap  
    TestSNOMEDAgentJUnit
    TestSNOMEDAgentJUnit class contains the test cases related to search and suggest of SNOMED CT.
    throwEclFeatureNotSupportedException  
    VersionedComponent
    VersionedComponent is the super class for all the Components Defined as an abstract class as it need not be instantiated
